question.question_text: What will the USD/JPY exchange rate be on 2026-03-26 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: Exchange rates are influenced by various economic factors and short-term fluctuations can be unpredictable. The point estimate assumes no major economic events affecting USD/JPY between now and the next trading day. The confidence intervals reflect typical daily volatility in the absence of any specific impactful news.
